architecture_fit.note: Pure NumPy softmax(-values), not a delta from base_model.py; no attention/QKV/residual stack, only weakly tracks the min (acc 0.54 canonical).

baseline_comparison.note: model_fn is byte-identical to the strawman linear baseline; lift_over_baseline_canonical ~= 2e-9, so it never beats the baseline it should defeat.

faithfulness.note: No model, no ablation, no causal evidence; README does not acknowledge the synthetic nature or propose a knockout check.

operating_range.note: Gap sweep 0.1-1.0 shows honest degradation (acc 0.14->0.99) but only ~1 order of magnitude and identical to baseline throughout.

hardcoded_weights_bonus.note: Mechanism is hand-coded with no training, but being trivially the baseline it demonstrates little mechanistic insight.

visual_judgement.note: app.py fails to import (NameError: np not defined in annotation); boot-check fails and the Demo tab cannot render.

visualisation_rationale.note: README justifies a 'heatmap' but the app uses a LinePlot, and the proposed comparison restates the baseline it actually equals.

notes: The contributed model_fn is exactly softmax(-values), which is byte-identical to the task's linear strawman baseline, so lift over baseline is ~2e-9 and there is no real mechanism beyond the baseline. There is no transformer/attention architecture, no causal/ablation evidence, and app.py crashes on import (missing numpy), failing the boot-check and Demo tab. Fails on the top three priority items (architecture fit, baseline comparison, faithfulness).
